description: 4-class Maximum Favorable Excursion bucket measured within 30 trading days post-breakout. Class boundaries (in % return): Noise (0-2], Moderate (2-10], Strong (10-30], Home Run (>30). Bucketing logic lives in scripts/train_mfe_classifier.py::create_mfe_labels. The MFE itself is sourced from v_d2_training.mfe_pct (materialized by FeaturePipeline + ViewManager.create_all).
exit_rule: C1 OR C2 OR C6 lost (close < SMA150 OR close < SMA200 OR close < SMA50). Trade defined by SepaWatchlistManager session boundaries; mfe_pct is the max close-to-close return reached within the open session, capped at the 30-trading-day horizon.
source_query: SELECT ticker, date, mfe_pct FROM v_d2_training WHERE feature_version = 'v3.1' AND mfe_pct IS NOT NULL
